rows.title: Homiletics
rows.description: This essential course trains students in the art and craft of biblical preaching, equipping them to communicate God's Word with clarity, power, and relevance. Students will master sermon preparation methods, exegetical techniques, rhetorical strategies, and delivery skills. The curriculum covers various sermon forms including expository, topical, and narrative preaching, while addressing contemporary challenges such as cultural engagement, application, and preaching to diverse audiences. Through theological reflection, practical exercises, and constructive feedback, students will develop their unique preaching voice and learn to proclaim Scripture faithfully in ways that transform lives and build up the body of Christ.
